learn.core_idea: Real workloads combine multiple blocking causes; liveness depends on consistent wakeup handling.
mechanism_steps: Track wakeup events from each source.
learn.worked_example: Read then sleep sequence requires both device IRQ and timer wake to complete fully.
common_mistakes: Ignoring trap return between blocked phases.
Assuming one wakeup implies full completion.
pre_challenge_checklist: I can identify each blocking reason.
I can map wakeups back to causes.
I can verify final completion metric.
